name: Beta bug report
about: Report a beta user-testing issue without secrets or real customer data
title: "[Beta] "
labels: beta, bug

---

## Safety Check

- [ ] I removed passwords, tokens, cookies, auth headers, database URLs, API keys, and secrets.
- [ ] I removed real customer-sensitive data and production document data.
- [ ] I removed PDF bodies, document bodies, attachment bodies, signed XML, and QR payloads.
- [ ] Screenshots/videos are redacted.

## Environment

- Browser/device:
- Route/page:
- Workflow step:
- Beta organization/test account identifier:

## Issue

- Expected behavior:
- Actual behavior:
- Reproduction steps:
  1.
  2.
  3.

## Classification

- Severity: Blocker / High / Medium / Low
- Issue type:
- Blocks beta usage: Yes / No
- Must fix before beta: Yes / No
- Must fix before production: Yes / No

- Redacted screenshot/video reference:
